results.title: Hopes quits Sixers after being handed Heat, Bulls jobs
results.description: Former ODI allrounder 'wrestled' with call to leave Sydney Sixers only weeks after his appointment, but chance to lead Queensland Bulls too was an opportunity 'too good to miss'
